basic_details.job_title: NFSU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website of NFSU. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NFSU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 60% marks and Ph.D. in relevant discipline, Good academic record
qualification.details: Assistant Professor - Forensic Biology/Biotechnology: Master's degree in Forensic Science/Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Life Sciences/Botany/Zoology/Microbiology/Genetics/Human Genetics/Molecular Biology/Forensic Biotechnology/Forensic Dentistry with 60% marks and Ph.D. in concerned/relevant/allied subject. Good academic record. Desirable: Minimum two research publications in UGC-CARE listed Journals/Web of Science/SCOPUS. Assistant Professor - Forensic Chemistry and Toxicology: Master's degree in Forensic Science/Analytical Chemistry/Chemistry/Toxicology/Pharmaceutical Science/Medicinal Chemistry/Pharmacy/Pharmacology with 60% marks and Ph.D. in concerned/relevant/allied subject. Good academic record. Desirable: Minimum two research publications in UGC-CARE listed Journals/Web of Science/SCOPUS. Assistant Professor - Forensic Physics/Ballistics/Fingerprint and Questioned Documents: Master's degree in Forensic Science/Physics/Chemistry/Criminology and Forensic Science/Materials Science/Applied Sciences with specialization in Forensic Physics/Ballistics or Fingerprints and Questioned Documents with 60% marks and Ph.D. in concerned/relevant/allied subject. Good academic record. Desirable: Minimum two research publications in UGC-CARE listed Journals/Web of Science/SCOPUS. Assistant Professor - Malware Analysis, Mobile Security, Web Application Security, Mobile and Network Forensics: M.Sc./MCA/ME/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering/Information Security/Cyber Security/Digital Forensics/Cyber Forensics/Network Technology/Information Technology/Data Science/Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning/IoT Security or relevant discipline with 60% marks and Ph.D. in concerned/relevant/allied subject. Good academic record. Desirable: Minimum two research publications in UGC-CARE listed Journals/Web of Science/SCOPUS. Assistant Professor - Blockchain and Cryptocurrencies, IoT Security and Forensics, Digital Forensics and Reverse Engineering: M.Sc./MCA/ME/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering/Information Security/Cyber Security/Digital Forensics/Cyber Forensics/Network Technology/Information Technology/Data Science/Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning/IoT Security or relevant discipline with 60% marks and Ph.D. in concerned/relevant/allied subject. Good academic record. Desirable: Minimum two research publications in UGC-CARE listed Journals/Web of Science/SCOPUS. Assistant Professor - Advanced Computer Forensics, Cyber Security and Cyber Warfare, Cyber Security Audit and Compliance, Incident Response: M.Sc./MCA/ME/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering/Information Security/Cyber Security/Digital Forensics/Cyber Forensics/Network Technology/Information Technology/Data Science/Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning/IoT Security or relevant discipline with 60% marks and Ph.D. in concerned/relevant/allied subject. Good academic record. Desirable: Minimum two research publications in UGC-CARE listed Journals/Web of Science/SCOPUS.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor - Forensic Chemistry and Toxicology
Assistant Professor - Forensic Physics/Ballistics/Fingerprint and Questioned Documents
Assistant Professor - Malware Analysis, Mobile Security, Web Application Security, Mobile and Network Forensics
Assistant Professor - Blockchain and Cryptocurrencies, IoT Security and Forensics, Digital Forensics and Reverse Engineering
Assistant Professor - Advanced Computer Forensics, Cyber Security and Cyber Warfare, Cyber Security Audit and Compliance, Incident Response

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFSU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFSU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NFSU Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the NFSU Assistant Professor recruitment is 19-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 60% marks and a Ph.D. in a relevant discipline, along with a good academic record, as per the specific post requirements.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Assistant Professor posts announced by the National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU).

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. SC/ST candidates have a reduced fee of Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 75,000 to Rs. 90,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NFSU Assistant Professor recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the NFSU Assistant Professor recruitment begins on 12-06-2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor posts at NFSU will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Forensic Sciences University located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the NFSU campus located in Jaipur, Rajasthan, with the pincode 302033.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor positions advertised by NFSU are on a contractual basis.
